title: Seth Godin endorses Incorruptible
summary: Seth Godin says Incorruptible will first inform and infuriate you, then help you see a path forward — and that it should be required reading for anyone who manages or has a manager.
blockquote: This profound book will inform and infuriate, and then it will help you see a path forward. It should be required reading for anyone who manages (or has a manager). Gravity is real.
attribution_title: Bestselling author of twenty-one books, including This Is Strategy
